title: 3rd Fortnight History Test, 1st 20th Century Test 12-19-24, 200 points

enrichment.summary: Kyle takes his first self-administered 20th century history test, using a random number generator to select 60 years from 1900–1999 and trying to recall notable events for each. He repeatedly acknowledges he did no studying, makes many speculative guesses about cars, music, wars, and US presidents, and says he will study harder before the next test.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: did zero studying and openly admits it
considers himself an ancient history guy, not a 20th century guy

stances.topic: doing poorly on a first attempt
stances.position: acceptable — shows you have no ego problems and can only go up
promises to study hard before the next 20th century test
